eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Kansas; at 5:19 PM on MAR 27, 2019 Effective until 6:19 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the required weekly test for the Kansas Division of Emergency Management. The only action required by recipients in the state of Kansas is to log this test.
